# Ubuntu system packages needed before running camera/robot setup.
#
# Install with:
#   sudo apt update
#   grep -vE '^\s*(#|$)' env/ubuntu_system_packages.txt | sudo xargs apt install -y
#
# Note: librealsense2 packages may require adding Intel RealSense's apt source
# first, depending on the Ubuntu version and machine image.
build-essential
pkg-config
ffmpeg
librealsense2-dev
librealsense2-utils
librealsense2-udev-rules
